reviews.review_description: Very little content currently. I will check again after some more app growth.

developer_response.body:
Yes, it was early access, during which I focused on developing the main features rather than uploading content. I’ve added more videos and finished the iPhone app, which lets you record and upload 3D videos directly to this Meta Quest app. I’ll be adding more content for you.

iPhone App: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/anaglyf/id6503052139
